title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Mastery Check
summary: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a secure-development gate stack. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.
Scan direct and transitive dependencies and triage exploitability and reachability.
Use static security analysis for data flow and dangerous patterns with reviewed queries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
